statement.en: Quantitative phytochemical analysis of Achyranthes aspera, Tinospora cordifolia, Cisus quadrangularis and Mimosa pudica from the Ramgarh Block of Ramgarh District, Jharkhand

proposer: Tarun Kumar Munda, Ishwari Prasad Gupta

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future date suggests provisional staging) presenting empirical phytochemical data. The work is not yet peer-reviewed validation; the quantitative claims are contingent on experimental methodology, replication, and subject to revision. The abstract provided is empty, preventing content-based truth evaluation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 四つの植物の中に眠る活性物質の総量が、その治癒力を呼び覚ます。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 四つの根から分泌される秘密の信号が、共鳴する中心の核へ収束する。
